about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Shanghai Xinhetong Trading Co., Ltd.
about.intro: Shanghai Xinhetong Trading Co., Ltd. is a comprehensive trading enterprise specializing in food sales, goods import/export, information consulting services, domestic trade agency, sales agency, and e-commerce sales.
about.intro2: Adhering to the business philosophy of "integrity-based, win-win cooperation", we are committed to providing high-quality products and professional trade services to clients at home and abroad. With an experienced business team and a complete service system, we have accumulated extensive industry experience in food trade, import/export agency, and information consulting.
about.visionText: To become a leading comprehensive trade service provider in the industry
about.missionText: Create value for clients and build bridges for partners
about.val1_desc: Honest and trustworthy, true to our word
about.val3_desc: Moving forward together, growing side by side
about.val4_desc: Keeping pace with the times, pioneering new paths

business.title: Business Areas
business.subtitle: Six Business Segments, Comprehensive Trade Services
business.biz1_desc: Covering snack foods, grain & oil products, beverages and more categories, with strict product quality control to meet the diverse needs of domestic and international customers. We maintain long-term cooperation with multiple quality food manufacturers to ensure stable supply and reliable quality.
business.biz2_desc: Providing professional information consulting services for import/export enterprises, including market research, industry analysis, policy and regulation interpretation, and competitive analysis. We help clients grasp market dynamics, reduce decision-making risks, and improve operational efficiency.
business.biz3_desc: Leveraging rich domestic market resources and extensive channel networks, we provide efficient matching services for supply and demand parties. Services include product procurement agency, sales agency, and supply chain management, helping clients expand in the domestic market.
business.biz4_desc: Providing professional sales agency services for domestic and international brands, including market promotion, channel development, client acquisition, and sales management. We help brands quickly enter markets and increase market share.
business.biz5_desc: Combining traditional trade advantages with internet technology, we conduct online sales through e-commerce platforms, social media, and other channels. We achieve integrated online-offline development to expand the boundaries of sales networks.
business.biz6_desc: Providing professional import/export agency services, including customs declaration, international logistics, foreign exchange settlement, and documentation processing. We are familiar with trade policies and customs procedures of various countries, ensuring smooth cargo clearance.
